what_happened: Pinning GitHub Actions to full commit SHAs — the workflow file had @v6 tags for checkout and setup-node, but the provided SHAs were for v4 releases
why: The task spec provided canonical pinned SHAs to use regardless of what semver tag was in the file; the intent is supply-chain security, not version preservation
fix_applied: Replaced all three mutable version tags (@v1, @v6) with full 40-character commit SHAs, adding inline version comments (# v1.11.4, # v4.2.2, # v4.4.0)
pattern_to_remember: When pinning GitHub Actions, always replace the @vX tag with a full 40-char SHA and append a comment like `# vX.Y.Z` so the human-readable version is preserved. The SHA supersedes whatever semver tag was in the file.
